question: Which one of the following would you say is the most important issue facing the country?
methodology_note: Percentages based on weighted responses of registered voters in TN from AP VoteCast 2024 general election survey. Weights: FINALVOTE_STATE_WEIGHT. Filtered to LIKELYVOTER==1 (likely voters). ISSUES2024 mapped to contract issue taxonomy; excluded DK/Refused (code 99); renormalized to sum to 1.
